mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS studentId, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.real_name AS realName, u.username, u.dept_id AS departmentId, d.name AS departmentName, u.phone AS maskedPhone, u.status, u.created_at AS createdAt, CASE WHEN total.required_points = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(completed.completed_required_points, 0) * 100.0 / total.required_points, 2) END AS averageProgressPercent FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cd.department_id, COUNT(cp.id) AS required_points FROM course_department cd INNER JOIN course c ON cd.course_id = c.id AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL INNER JOIN course_point cp ON cp.course_id = c.id AND cp.status = 1 AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL AND cp.required = 1 GROUP BY cd.department_id ) total ON u.dept_id = total.department_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT uc.user_id, cd.department_id, COUNT(uc.id) AS completed_required_points FROM user_course_point_progress uc INNER JOIN course_point cp ON uc.course_point_id = cp.id AND cp.status = 1 AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL AND cp.required = 1 INNER JOIN course c ON cp.course_id = c.id AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL INNER JOIN course_department cd ON c.id = cd.course_id WHERE uc.status = 2 GROUP BY uc.user_id, cd.department_id ) completed ON u.id = completed.user_id AND u.dept_id = completed.department_id WHERE u.role_type = 1 AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.dept_id = #{departmentId}
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC, u.id DESC
SELECT name FROM department WHERE id = #{deptId}
SELECT status FROM department WHERE id = #{deptId}

SELECT u.dept_id AS departmentId, d.name AS departmentName, COUNT(u.id) AS studentCount FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.id WHERE u.role_type = 1 AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND u.status = 1
GROUP BY u.dept_id, d.name ORDER BY studentCount DESC, u.dept_id ASC

SELECT c.id AS courseId, c.title AS courseTitle, CASE WHEN cd.required = 1 THEN 'REQUIRED' ELSE 'OPTIONAL' END AS courseType, CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 'LEARNING' ELSE 'NOT_STARTED' END AS learningStatus, COALESCE(p.progress_percent, 0) AS progressPercent FROM course c INNER JOIN course_department cd ON c.id = cd.course_id LEFT JOIN user_course_progress p ON p.course_id = c.id AND p.user_id = #{userId} WHERE cd.department_id = #{deptId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.progress_percent DESC, c.id DESC
SELECT id AS departmentId, name AS departmentName FROM department WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT 1 FROM course c INNER JOIN course_department cd ON c.id = cd.course_id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} AND cd.department_id = #{deptId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
